name: Enchiladas Verdes (Green Enchiladas)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Grated cheddar or jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the corn tortillas in oil until softened.
2. Heat the garlic in oil, then discard the garlic.
3. Blend flour into the hot oil.
4. Stir in the green chili sauce and heat thoroughly. If the mixture is too thick, add water.
5. Add salt to taste.
6. Layer tortillas with sauce, minced onion, and cheese on oven-proof plates.
7. Sprinkle cheese on top.
8. Use 3 tortillas for each serving.
9. Place in the oven until the cheese melts. For a real New Mexican touch, place a poached or fried egg on top; the egg helps meld the flavors.
